name: Rototiller
description: Tills the soil to prepare for planting.
worldEffect: Creates fertile soil for crops and flowers.

name: Sunny Day
worldEffect: Increases temperature, helps fire types, dries wet areas.

name: Rain Dance
worldEffect: Increases humidity, waters crops, helps water types.

name: Rock Smash
worldEffect: Destroys small boulders, creates gravel paths.

name: Cut
description: Cuts through tall grass and small trees.

name: Strength
worldEffect: Push large rocks to create new paths or habitats.

name: Flash
worldEffect: Lights up caves, powers streetlights at night.

name: Surf
worldEffect: Access new islands, discover hidden areas.
